title: betula rossica
intro: Betula rossica, also known as the Russian birch, is a species of tree belonging to the birch genus. The bark of the Betula rossica plant contains salicin, a compound with anti-inflammatory properties, which makes it a valuable plant for medicinal purposes. The medicinal properties of Betula rossica include reducing pain, inflammation, and fever, and its health benefits include improving digestive issues and skin conditions. Betula rossica is traditionally prepared as a tea or tincture by steeping the bark in hot water or ethanol, respectively, to release its medicinal compounds.
